pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 43 defines DOC_PATH='/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Q3-Marketing-Report', and this path is used consistently in API calls (line 48, 85) and export script (line 21). Nuxeo REST API path structure verified via documentation.

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 16 defines DATA_DIR='/home/ga/nuxeo/data', and line 40 references '$DATA_DIR/report_cover.jpg'. The file is created at this location via either copying from /workspace/data/grand_prismatic.jpg (line 34) or synthetic generation via ImageMagick convert command (line 32). File permissions set at lines 37-38.

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 96 computes digest using 'md5sum' command: LOCAL_IMG_DIGEST=$(md5sum "$DATA_DIR/report_cover.jpg" | awk '{print $1}'). Export script line 71 uses the target_thumbnail_digest from this computation. MD5 is the default digest algorithm in Nuxeo Platform for blob storage per Nuxeo documentation.

privileged_info_summary: The task updates a document's thumbnail in Nuxeo Platform while preserving the main file content. The document is located at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Q3-Marketing-Report (Q3 Marketing Report). A synthetic thumbnail image will be created at /home/ga/nuxeo/data/report_cover.jpg using ImageMagick gradient generation (640x480 pixels, blue-red gradient) since the expected source file (grand_prismatic.jpg) does not exist in the environment. The thumbnail update verification uses MD5 digest comparison to confirm the correct image was uploaded. The main document file (annual_report_2023.pdf) must be preserved during this operation to pass verification.
